---
title : "Justification Trajectories for Pension Inequality in Chile (2016-2023): The Role of Social Class and Beliefs in Meritocracy"
date : "2025-01-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan Carlos; Canales, Rene; Laffert, Andreas & Urzua, Tomas"
categories : ["Presentation"]
publication : " XII Conferencia Internacional COES "
publication_short : " XII Conferencia Internacional COES "
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
---
<iframe
src="https://jus-mer.github.io/stratification-market-justice/presentations/COES_2025/COES_2025.html#/cambios-en-la-justificaci%C3%B3n-en-la-desigualdad-de-pensiones-en-chile-20162023"
title="Xaringan presentation"
style="width: 100%; max-width: 100%; height: 450px; border: 0;"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
allowfullscreen>
</iframe>


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan Carlos; Canales, Rene; Laffert, Andreas & Urzua, Tomas (2025). *Justification Trajectories for Pension Inequality in Chile (2016-2023): The Role of Social Class and Beliefs in Meritocracy*.  XII Conferencia Internacional COES 

:::
